item.title: Version 0.4.8
item.description:
Voce 0.4.8

  • Fixes the disabled "Check for Updates" state by shipping the correct Sparkle configuration in the app bundle
  • Enables automatic background update checks by default

item.title: Version 0.4.7
item.description:
Voce 0.4.7

  • Improves live dictation stop handling so the final words are less likely to be clipped when you release push-to-talk
  • Waits for captured audio and final transcript updates to settle before insertion

item.title: Version 0.4.6
item.description:
Voce 0.4.6

  • Preserves unsaved settings drafts when switching tabs or collapsing settings groups
  • Fixes the "Last transcript" actions to use the current transcript immediately after dictation finishes
  • Improves desktop readability with denser adaptive backgrounds and overlay surfaces

item.title: Version 0.4.5
item.description:
Voce 0.4.5

  • Fixed live Moonshine dictation for Bluetooth microphones by preserving each microphone's native sample rate instead of resampling in-app before streaming
  • Preloaded and reused the active Moonshine transcriber so repeat recordings start faster
  • Updated the app icon artwork and improved the dictation overlay's input anchoring heuristics

item.title: Version 0.4.3
item.description:
Voce 0.4.3

  • Reworked live Moonshine microphone streaming to feed audio to the stream immediately instead of batching it through the custom timer queue
  • Empty live captures now show a visible error instead of silently creating blank transcript history entries

item.title: Version 0.4.2
item.description:
Voce 0.4.2

  • Fixed Sparkle update checks by supplying the appcast URL from code when the generated Info.plist omits SUFeedURL

item.title: Version 0.4.1
item.description:
Voce 0.4.1

  • Fixed recording startup to surface microphone permission failures instead of appearing ready without capturing audio
  • Fixed Moonshine streaming stop/finalization so buffered audio is flushed and transcription errors are not silently dropped
  • Fixed model readiness checks to validate the configured Moonshine model directory correctly

item.title: Version 0.4.0
item.description:
Voce 0.4.0

  • Renamed from Murmur to Voce (from Sotto Voce)
  • New bundle identifier: io.voceapp.voce
  • All features from v0.3.0 carry forward

item.title: Version 0.3.0
item.description:
Voce 0.3.0

  • Voice commands: say "period", "new line", "delete that" and more — plus custom commands
  • Context-aware filler removal: "you know the answer" is kept, filler "you know" is removed
  • Adaptive learning engine that improves accuracy the more you use it
  • Auto-lexicon: corrections you make repeatedly get learned automatically
  • Snippet suggestions: frequently repeated phrases are suggested as shortcuts
  • Per-app style suggestions: Voce learns your dictation style in each app
  • Vocabulary-biased ranking: your common words and jargon are prioritized

item.title: Version 0.2.0
item.description:
Voce 0.2.0

  • Replaced Whisper backend with Moonshine for faster, smaller, local transcription
  • Live streaming transcription — see text appear in the overlay as you speak
  • Automatic model download from Moonshine CDN on first launch
  • Added Sparkle for automatic update checking
